service.name: DeepSeek API
service.description_for_ai: Chinese AI lab with cheapest frontier-quality models. DeepSeek V3 and R1 offer near-GPT-4 quality at 10-50x lower cost. OpenAI-compatible API. Best for high-volume, cost-sensitive applications. DeepSeek R1 has strong reasoning/math. Note: servers in China — consider latency and data privacy.

auth.cost: DeepSeek V4 Flash: $0.14/$0.28 per 1M tokens. DeepSeek R1: $0.55/$2.19. Cache hits: $0.014/$0.028

capabilities.description_for_ai: OpenAI-compatible chat completions at dramatically lower cost. DeepSeek-V3 for general tasks, DeepSeek-R1 for reasoning/math/code. Best price-to-quality ratio in 2026.

agent_hints.price_tip: DeepSeek V4 Flash at $0.14/$0.28 is 10-50x cheaper than GPT-4o for similar quality tasks.
agent_hints.reasoner: deepseek-reasoner (R1) shows chain-of-thought in reasoning_content field before final answer. Best for math, code, logic.
agent_hints.openai_compat: Drop-in OpenAI replacement: change base URL + model name. No other code changes needed.
agent_hints.cache_discount: Cache hit pricing is 100x cheaper — structure prompts to maximize cache reuse.
agent_hints.data_privacy: Servers in China. Do not send sensitive personal data or confidential business information.
agent_hints.stability: DeepSeek has had reliability issues during peak demand. Add retry logic and consider fallback to OpenAI/Gemini.
